description: You are a Spacecraft Communications Engineer for the Deep Space Network (DSN). Simulate the line-of-sight visibility of Mars during the Perseverance rover landing on February 18, 2021, at 20:30:00 UTC to verify the telemetry handoff from the Madrid complex (40.427° N, 4.250° W) to the Goldstone complex (35.426° N, 116.890° W). For both locations at the specified time, capture screenshots of Mars centered in a radio-frequency observation view (no atmosphere or landscape, with azimuthal grid and labels enabled) and save them to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Write a handoff report to ~/Desktop/dsn_handoff_report.txt that includes the date, the target, both complex locations, and a confirmation of simultaneous visibility.

metadata.data_source: NASA DSN Complex Coordinates, Mars 2020 Landing Timeline
